shot_types.name: Macro Detail
shot_types.use: Show texture, material, interface detail, or craftsmanship.
shot_types.camera: close macro lens feel, shallow depth of field, controlled focus pull

shot_types.name: Hero Reveal
shot_types.use: Introduce the product or central subject.
shot_types.camera: treatment-specific reveal move, locked frame, lateral slide, threshold crossing, or clean frontal angle when justified

shot_types.name: Environment Establishing
shot_types.use: Set world, tone, location, and campaign atmosphere.
shot_types.camera: wide shot, deliberate pan, dolly, or locked architectural frame

shot_types.name: Graphic Plate
shot_types.use: Create clean space for edit-layer typography.

shot_types.name: Final Hero Hold
shot_types.use: Close with product, brand mark, offer, or CTA.
shot_types.camera: locked or subtle drift, clean composition
